Arabic RTL shaping plugin is served locally
All valid coordinate records reach the GeoJSON map
Selection panel is application-owned and visible
List scroll keeps selection panel visible
Page scroll keeps selection panel visible
Second selection updates the same panel
Close restores focus without page scroll
No MapLibre popup is used for full details
1920x1080: mobile panel is a bottom sheet
1920x1080: RTL controls stay on the right

1440x1000: RTL controls stay on the right

1024x900: RTL controls stay on the right
